title: AppleHV CI failures
body:
According to [this AppleHV CI run ](https://cirrus-ci.com/task/6643104917225472) and verified locally, we have a few test failures on AppleHV. Opening this issue to track these failures and fixes.

- [ ]   [FAIL] podman machine set [It] set machine cpus, disk, memory
         /Users/MacM1-7-worker/ci/task-6643104917225472/pkg/machine/e2e/set_test.go:44
- [x]   [FAIL] podman machine set [It] set rootful with docker sock change
         /Users/MacM1-7-worker/ci/task-6643104917225472/pkg/machine/e2e/set_test.go:160
- [ ]   [FAIL] podman machine rm [It] Remove machine sharing ssh key with another machine
         /Users/MacM1-7-worker/ci/task-6643104917225472/pkg/machine/e2e/rm_test.go:171
- [ ]   [FAIL] podman machine proxy settings propagation [It] ssh to running machine and check proxy settings
         /Users/MacM1-7-worker/ci/task-6643104917225472/pkg/machine/e2e/proxy_test.go:58
- [ ]   [FAIL] podman machine stop [It] Stop running machine
         /Users/MacM1-7-worker/ci/task-6643104917225472/pkg/machine/e2e/stop_test.go:59
- [ ]   [TIMEDOUT] podman machine list [It] list machine
         /Users/MacM1-7-worker/ci/task-6643104917225472/pkg/machine/e2e/list_test.go:28

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
